requirements: No baked title, text, menu buttons, logo, border or watermark.
Preserve a full-bleed 16:9-compatible composition under centered aspect-fill cropping.
Runtime performs no file IO or resource creation in Draw.
globalStyle: High-detail side-view fantasy sandbox pixel art with crisp clustered pixels, layered atmospheric depth and warm practical lights.
globalNegativePrompt: text, logo, UI panel, watermark, photorealism, vector art, smooth 3D render, giant character, blank central rectangle
globalRequirements: No baked title, text, menu buttons, logo, border or watermark.
Preserve a full-bleed 16:9-compatible composition under centered aspect-fill cropping.
Runtime must load the PNG only during MainMenuState.LoadContent and dispose it when the state exits.
Runtime draw uses the existing PointClamp sampler and performs no file IO or resource creation in Draw.
Code-native ambient animation must honor reduced-motion and animation-speed settings.
A procedural fallback remains available when the file is absent.

briefs.subject: Full-screen main-menu backdrop behind code-native navigation, title, focus states and animated ambient accents.
briefs.prompt: Create a full-bleed magical dusk valley framed by massive inhabited trees, with three prominent floating islands, layered blue-green mountains, terraced jungle ruins, waterfalls, foreground vegetation and a naturally calm center-left navigation area.
requirements: Massive ancient trees and inhabited treehouse platforms frame the far left and right edges.
Three prominent floating islands occupy the upper middle and carry foliage, dangling roots and waterfalls.
A deep blue-green mountain valley and overgrown terraced ruin city fill the middle and lower distance.
The sky transitions from deep violet-blue to coral-gold dusk and contains restrained stars.
The center-left remains naturally dark enough for a narrow vertical menu without becoming an empty rectangle.
